notes: Filesystem was warm from prior Hy3 runs. IO probes validate one contiguous pread per expert span. Cache-sim probes validate native slot-bank scheduling; hot repeats a 2-token expert set, rolling is adversarial churn. Real route trace captured from Python Hy3 generate-cache top5/slot16 prompt and replayed through C++ --trace. Latest real trace includes prompt prefill plus two decode steps (3 generated-token attempts) from Python Hy3 generate-cache top5/slot16 and C++ --trace replay. Added one-layer routed MoE parity fixture and C++ q4 affine expert-bank replay. All-layer routed parity now passes with relative tolerance across 79 MoE layers. Prefill4 all-layer routed parity passes with 4-token fixtures through the split C++ substrate. Layer-major C++ fixture replay dedups per-layer prompt experts; prefill4 saved 172 reads / 1.70068GiB with parity intact. Prefill16 layer-major replay passed all 79 layers and saved 3311 reads / 32.7382GiB vs naive route replay. Order-preserving layer-major replay loads unique experts once, then accumulates in original token-major/top-k order. Apple Accelerate qlinear path cut prefill4 layer-major wall to 114.951s while preserving parity. Apple Accelerate qlinear path cut prefill16 layer-major wall to 450.728s while preserving parity. Expert-major dense q4 reuse cut prefill16 layer-major wall to 239.448s while preserving route-order parity.
